evals.name: Discover Radio
evals.description: Find a USRP radio on the network and report its status
evals.prompt: I have a USRP N310 somewhere on my network. Find it from MATLAB and show me its status, including what UHD version it's running.

context.setup: N310 simulator running at 192.168.0.1 via Docker

assertions.description: Uses findsdru (the MATLAB function) for radio discovery, not uhd_find_devices or shell commands
Does not use internal wt.internal APIs
Reports the UHD version by calling getSDRuDriverVersion or showing UHD version info from the device
Uses probesdru to get detailed hardware info (motherboard, daughterboard, firmware) rather than only relying on findsdru

evals.name: Troubleshoot Connection
evals.description: Diagnose why basebandReceiver fails despite radio being pingable
evals.prompt: I can ping my USRP N310 at 192.168.0.1 but when I try basebandReceiver('N310') it errors out. Help me figure out what's wrong and fix it.

context.setup: N310 simulator running at 192.168.0.1, no saved radio configurations

assertions.description: Uses findsdru as a diagnostic step to check device reachability
Recommends creating a saved radio configuration via radioSetupWizard, DeviceStore, or radioConfigurations
Discusses network configuration (MTU, NIC, or buffer settings) as part of troubleshooting
Does not shell out to uhd_find_devices
Uses radioConfigurations to check for existing saved configs or recommends creating one via radioSetupWizard or DeviceStore

evals.name: Full Setup Workflow
evals.description: Walk through the complete setup from discovery to verification
evals.prompt: I just got a USRP X410 connected to my Linux PC via 10GbE. Walk me through the complete setup process to get it working with Wireless Testbench, from discovery to verifying TX/RX works.

context.setup: Wireless Testbench installed, no saved radio configurations

assertions.description: Uses findsdru for device discovery rather than shell commands or uhd_find_devices
Checks or mentions UHD version compatibility between host and device
Creates, reuses, or recommends a saved radio configuration via radioSetupWizard, DeviceStore, or radioConfigurations
Uses basebandTransceiver for verification (not sdruload or comm.SDRu*)
Does not use sdruload to load bitstreams (basebandTransceiver loads its own)
